diagramConstraints.description: Separate network segments (LAN, WAN, DMZ) into distinct subgraphs with labeled boundaries
Label each network device with its type (router, switch, firewall, server) and hostname or IP
Label connections with protocol and port information where relevant
Visually distinguish security zones (trusted, untrusted, DMZ) using subgraph boundaries

formattingRules.description: Arrange devices in a hierarchical layout with core at top, distribution in middle, and access at bottom
